Class KeyAst.File

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeyAst<KeYParser.FileContext>
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.KeyAst.File
Enclosing class:
KeyAst<T extends ParserRuleContext>
public static class KeyAst.File extends KeyAst<KeYParser.FileContext>
An AST representing a complete KeY file.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class KeyAst

    KeyAst.ConfigurationFile, KeyAst.Declarations, KeyAst.Expression, KeyAst.File, KeyAst.ProofScript, KeyAst.Seq, KeyAst.SetStatementContext, KeyAst.Taclet, KeyAst.Term

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nullable Token
    findProof()
    Returns the token \proof in the underlying parse tree.` This token also marks the end of the parse tree (EOF) but not the end of the file.
    @Nullable KeyAst.ProofScript
    findProofScript()
    Returns the a ProofScriptEntry from the underlying AST if an \proofscript entry is present.
    @Nullable ProofSettings
    findProofSettings()
    Returns proof settings (aka \settings) if found in the parse tree.
    ChoiceInformation
    getChoices()
    Returns the information on choices from the underlying parse tree.
    Includes
    getIncludes(Path base)
    Returns the includes (possible empty but not null) computed from the underlying parse tree.
    @Nullable KeyAst.Declarations
    getProblemHeader()
    Extracts the decls and taclets into a string.
    ProblemInformation
    getProblemInformation()
    Returns information on \problem, \proofObligation or \chooseContract using the underlying parse tree.

    Methods inherited from class KeyAst

    accept, getStartLocation, getText, toString

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • findProofSettings

      public @Nullable ProofSettings findProofSettings()
      Returns proof settings (aka \settings) if found in the parse tree.

    • findProofScript

      public @Nullable KeyAst.ProofScript findProofScript()
      Returns the a ProofScriptEntry from the underlying AST if an \proofscript entry is present. The url is used as the source of input and might be later used for error message, or including other files.
      Returns:
      a ProofScriptEntry if \proofscript is present

    • getIncludes

      public Includes getIncludes(Path base)
      Returns the includes (possible empty but not null) computed from the underlying parse tree.

    • getChoices

      public ChoiceInformation getChoices()
      Returns the information on choices from the underlying parse tree.

    • getProblemInformation

      public ProblemInformation getProblemInformation()
      Returns information on \problem, \proofObligation or \chooseContract using the underlying parse tree.

    • findProof

      public @Nullable Token findProof()
      Returns the token \proof in the underlying parse tree.` This token also marks the end of the parse tree (EOF) but not the end of the file. Positional information of the token is used to set up the proof replayer.

    • getProblemHeader

      public @Nullable KeyAst.Declarations getProblemHeader()
      Extracts the decls and taclets into a string. The problem header may contain the bootstrap classpath, the regular classpath, the Java source file to load, include statements to load other files, configuration of options, declarations of sorts, program variables, schema variables, predicates, and more. See the grammar (KeYParser.g4) for more possible elements.
